jobs.title: Manager, Customer Success Managers, SEMA
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>GitLab is the intelligent orchestration platform for DevSecOps. GitLab enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. More than 50 million registered users and more than 50% of the Fortune 100* trust GitLab to ship better, more secure software faster.</p> <p>The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high-performance culture is driven by our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/values/">values</a> and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OuZIb5zszQI">Co-create the future with us</a> as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software.</p> <p>*<em>Fortune 500® is a registered trademark of Fortune Media IP Limited, used under license. Claim based on GitLab data. Fortune 100 refers to the top 20% ranked companies in the 2025 Fortune 500 list, published in June 2025. Fortune and Fortune Media IP Limited are not affiliated with, and do not endorse products or services of GitLab.</em></p></div><p>The Customer Success Management (CSM) team focuses on the themes of align, enable, and expand. We align with customers’ desired business outcomes, enable them on their existing use cases, and work with them to expand into additional use cases, ensuring ongoing and ever-improving customer return-on-investment.</p> <p>Additionally, our team serves as liaisons between the customer and the GitLab ecosystem, streamlining collaboration with Product Management, Engineering, Sales, Professional Services, and others. <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/customer-success/csm">CSM handbook</a>.</p> <h2><strong>What you'll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Mentor and enable the team to exceed company growth and retention forecasts</li> <li>Work with the Customer Success Director to help establish and manage goals and responsibilities for CSMs</li> <li>Manage a team of highly motivated, customer-focused CSMs to manage the overall health and care of accounts (e.g., onboarding customers, stage adoption, executive business reviews, and successful renewals)</li> <li>Ensure the CSMs exceed GitLab expectations in core knowledge, communication, and execution</li> <li>Challenge the team and yourself to learn and grow as trusted advisors to customers continually</li> <li>Provide leadership and guidance to coach, motivate and lead the team members to their optimum performance levels and career development, providing timely feedback and development assistance</li> <li>Manage resource assignments and staffing levels, including recruitment as needed</li> <li>Identify and implement improvements to the processes and tools used</li> <li>Develop senior-level relationships with customers</li> <li>Partner with other team leaders to ensure the customer is supported in times of escalation</li> <li>Develop strong relationships with Engineering and Product to ensure cohesion and shared understanding of goals, initiatives</li> <li>Oversee initiatives set forth in <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/company/okrs/">OKRs</a></li> <li>Work together with the other managers to execute strategies and vision with the Director</li> <li>Represent GitLab leadership and reflect our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/values/">GitLab values</a> in internal and external interactions</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What you'll bring</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Proven track record in software/technology sales, consulting or customer success</li> <li>Proven experience leading teams, driving software adoption, and building and scaling customer success management practices</li> <li>Experience with software development lifecycle processes and tools as well as agile and/or DevOps practices</li> <li>Knowledgeable with cloud/container technologies (e.g., Kubernetes, Docker), application security (SAST, DAST) and/or cloud deployment models (AWS, GCP, Azure) is a plus</li> <li>Proven ability to develop strategies, translate them into initiatives and track successful delivery</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to lead managers and successfully manage global, distributed teams across cultures, lines of business, and geographies</li> <li>Possession of a strong management presence and leadership ability, with communication and interpersonal skills that inspire and motivate leaders and teams</li> <li>Demonstration of operational excellence in analytical thinking, process development and improvement, problem-solving, communication, delegation, and planning</li> <li>Ability to collaborate across the organization and with external stakeholders</li> <li>Experience successfully working with senior executives (VP/CxO)</li> <li>Holds strong operational skills that will drive organizational efficiencies and customer satisfaction</li> <li>Comfortable giving and receiving positive and constructive feedback</li> <li>Ability to connect technology with measurable business value</li> <li>Strategic thinking about business, products, and technical challenges</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><h4><strong>How GitLab Supports Full-Time Employees</strong></h4> <ul> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/">Benefits to support your health, finances, and well-being</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/paid-time-off/">Flexible Paid Time Off</a>&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/erg-guide/#:~:text=Definition%20of%20the%20TMRG%20%2D%20Team%20Member%20Resource%20Groups,-TMRGs%20are%20voluntary&amp;text=The%20purpose%20for%20this%20type,developing%20the%20sense%20of%20belonging.">Team Member Resource Groups</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/stock-options/">Equity Compensation &amp; Employee Stock Purchase Plan</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/learning-and-development/growth-and-development/">Growth and Development Fund</a></li> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/#parental-leave">Parental leave</a>&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/finance/expenses/#equipment">Home office</a> support</li> </ul> <p>Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/#examples-of-select-underrepresented-groups">underrepresented groups</a> are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.</p> <hr> <p><strong>Country Hiring Guidelines: </strong>GitLab hires new team members in countries around the world. All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry specific location-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting process.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy: </strong>Please review our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/candidate-faq/recruitment-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">Recruitment Privacy Policy.</a> Your privacy is important to us.</p> <p>GitLab is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. GitLab’s policies and practices relating to recruitment, employment, career development and advancement, promotion, and retirement are based solely on merit, regardless of race, color, religion, ancestry, sex (including pregnancy, lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression), national origin, age, citizenship, marital status, mental or physical disability, genetic information (including family medical history), discharge status from the military, protected veteran status (which includes disabled veterans, recently separated veterans, active duty wartime or campaign badge veterans, and Armed Forces service medal veterans), or any other basis protected by law. GitLab will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. jobs.title: Presales Consultant - Japan
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>GitLab is the intelligent orchestration platform for DevSecOps. GitLab enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. More than 50 million registered users and more than 50% of the Fortune 100* trust GitLab to ship better, more secure software faster.</p> <p>The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high-performance culture is driven by our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/values/">values</a> and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OuZIb5zszQI">Co-create the future with us</a> as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software.</p> <p>*<em>Fortune 500® is a registered trademark of Fortune Media IP Limited, used under license. Claim based on GitLab data. Fortune 100 refers to the top 20% ranked companies in the 2025 Fortune 500 list, published in June 2025. Fortune and Fortune Media IP Limited are not affiliated with, and do not endorse products or services of GitLab.</em></p></div><h2>An overview of this role</h2> <p>As a Solutions Architect, you’ll be a trusted advisor to GitLab prospects and customers in Japan helping them understand how GitLab’s DevSecOps platform addresses both technical requirements and business objectives across the entire software development lifecycle. You’ll guide organizations through their digital transformation journeys, from planning through monitoring, using your technical expertise, understanding of cloud and modern software development practices, and strong customer empathy. Reporting to a regional Solutions Architect manager and partnering closely with Account Executives and cross-functional teams, you’ll own technical evaluations (including proof of value initiatives and workshops), shape solution architectures, and serve as the voice of the customer back to Product Management. In your first year, you’ll focus on driving successful platform adoption, influencing revenue growth through solution selling, and building long-term, trust-based relationships that showcase GitLab’s differentiated position in an AI-driven DevSecOps landscape.</p> <h2>What you’ll do</h2> <ul> <li value="1">Lead technical discovery, demos, and validation (including proofs of value) to show how GitLab’s AI-powered DevSecOps platform meets customers’ technical and business needs across the full lifecycle.</li> <li value="2">Drive the technical evaluation process as the Directly Responsible Individual, including solution design, POC/POV ownership, workshop design, and the technical components of tenders, audits, and value stream assessments.</li> <li value="3">Collaborate with Account Executives and regional sales teams in Japan to shape and execute account strategies that support new customer acquisition and expansion.</li> <li value="4">Build and deepen relationships with technical practitioners and business leaders, guiding them through GitLab-driven digital transformation and enabling them to become GitLab advocates.</li> <li value="5">Advise customers on modern software development, continuous integration, continuous deployment, security, and cloud practices, challenging existing approaches to improve return on investment.</li> <li value="6">Serve as the voice of the customer with Product Management, Engineering, Sales, and Marketing by sharing feedback, use cases, and competitive insights that inform roadmap and positioning.</li> <li value="7">Maintain and extend your technical expertise in GitLab, DevSecOps, AI, and related cloud technologies, creating reusable examples, best practice guidance, and technical collateral for customers and partners.</li> <li value="8">Invest in your own growth and development through ongoing learning, mentorship, and knowledge sharing to continuously improve the impact of the Solutions Architect team.</li> </ul> <h2>What you’ll bring</h2> <ul> <li value="1">Experience engaging with customers in technical pre-sales, consulting, or similar roles, guiding them through solution design and evaluation.</li> <li value="2">Proficiency with the end-to-end software development lifecycle, including modern DevSecOps practices and continuous integration and continuous deployment workflows.</li> <li value="3">Hands-on experience with GitLab or comparable source control, CI/CD, and collaboration platforms, and the ability to map platform capabilities to customer use cases.</li> <li value="4">Practical knowledge of cloud computing concepts and related technologies, with the ability to discuss deployment, security, and operations options with technical teams.</li> <li value="5">Ability to lead technical evaluations such as proofs of concept or proofs of value, contribute to tenders or audits, and design and run workshops or value stream assessments.</li> <li value="6">Clear technical communication and presentation skills, with the ability to adapt messages for practitioners through to senior business and technical decision makers.</li> <li value="7">Skill in building trusted relationships, listening with empathy, and acting as a customer advocate to internal teams such as Product, Engineering, Sales, and Marketing.</li> <li value="8">Motivation to continuously develop professionally, including learning new technologies, deepening GitLab platform expertise, and applying transferable experience from related fields.</li> </ul> <h2>About the team</h2> <p>We, the Solutions Architect team, are part of GitLab’s Sales organization and serve as the technical counterpart to Account Executives, with this role focused on opportunities in Japan and reporting into a regional Solutions Architect Manager. Our mission is to help customers realize the full value of GitLab’s AI-powered DevSecOps platform by advising on architecture, running technical evaluations such as proofs of value, and guiding customers through their digital transformation. We work closely with Sales, Product Management, Engineering, and Marketing, collaborating asynchronously across regions to share best practices, create reusable technical collateral, and act as the voice of the customer. We are focused on helping customers modernize end-to-end software delivery, adopt GitLab at scale, and navigate a rapidly evolving AI and DevSecOps landscape.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h4><strong>How GitLab Supports Full-Time Employees</strong></h4> <ul> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/">Benefits to support your health, finances, and well-being</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/paid-time-off/">Flexible Paid Time Off</a>&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/erg-guide/#:~:text=Definition%20of%20the%20TMRG%20%2D%20Team%20Member%20Resource%20Groups,-TMRGs%20are%20voluntary&amp;text=The%20purpose%20for%20this%20type,developing%20the%20sense%20of%20belonging.">Team Member Resource Groups</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/stock-options/">Equity Compensation &amp; Employee Stock Purchase Plan</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/learning-and-development/growth-and-development/">Growth and Development Fund</a></li> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/#parental-leave">Parental leave</a>&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/finance/expenses/#equipment">Home office</a> support</li> </ul> <p>Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/#examples-of-select-underrepresented-groups">underrepresented groups</a> are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.</p> <hr> <p><strong>Country Hiring Guidelines: </strong>GitLab hires new team members in countries around the world. All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry specific location-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting process.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy: </strong>Please review our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/candidate-faq/recruitment-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">Recruitment Privacy Policy.</a> Your privacy is important to us.</p> <p>GitLab is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. GitLab’s policies and practices relating to recruitment, employment, career development and advancement, promotion, and retirement are based solely on merit, regardless of race, color, religion, ancestry, sex (including pregnancy, lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression), national origin, age, citizenship, marital status, mental or physical disability, genetic information (including family medical history), discharge status from the military, protected veteran status (which includes disabled veterans, recently separated veterans, active duty wartime or campaign badge veterans, and Armed Forces service medal veterans), or any other basis protected by law. GitLab will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. See also&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/people-policies/inc-usa/#equal-employment-opportunity-policy" target="_blank">GitLab’s EEO Policy</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/labor-and-employment-notices/#eeoc-us-equal-employment-opportunity-commission-notices" target="_blank">EEO is the Law</a>. If you have a disability or special need that requires&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/people-policies/inc-usa/#reasonable-accommodation" target="_blank">accommodation</a>, please let us know during the&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/interviewing/#adjustments-to-our-interview-process" target="_blank">recruiting process</a>.</p></div>

advisory services across the entire GitLab feature stack.</p> <p>Professional Services Engineers are expected to be able to interface not only with the customer, but with our GitLab Product/Engineering teams, to find the best route for customer success, and to help drive improvements into GitLab features and processes.</p> <div> <h2>What you'll do</h2> <ul> <li>Uses a consultative approach to customer engagements</li> <li>Does not focus on just “doing the work”</li> <li>Looks for opportunities to help the customer achieve their vision more effectively and efficiently</li> <li>Delivers on SOW with guidance from technical architects <ul> <li>SOW scope may include: <ul> <li>Installation and configuration of GitLab solutions in the customer environment</li> <li>Provide technical training sessions remotely and/or on-site</li> <li>Provide documentation for implementation, guides, maintenance, etc relevant to the customer requirements.</li> <li>Manage creation of new and/or maintenance of existing artifacts and templates for deliverables and training</li> <li>Develop and implement migration plans for customer VCS &amp; data migration</li> </ul> </li> </ul> </li> <li>Contributes to the extension and maintenance of documentation/scripts for implementation and workflow to align with custom requirements</li> <li>Documents opportunities to help the customer achieve their vision more effectively and efficiently</li> <li>Communicate opportunities to the customer project and account team</li> <li>Supports engagement managers on quoting and scoping of SOWs</li> <li>Document and implement improvements for Professional Services engagement processes</li> </ul> <h2>What you'll bring</h2> <ul> <li>Professional exposure with one or more IaC/CaC technologies: <ul> <li>Terraform</li> <li>Ansible</li> <li>Packer</li> <li>Puppet</li> <li>Chef</li> </ul> </li> <li>Professional exposure with one or more cloud providers: <ul> <li>AWS</li> <li>GCP</li> <li>Azure</li> </ul> </li> <li>Proficienct in the English language, both written and verbal, sufficient for success in a remote and largely asynchronous work environment</li> <li>Experience using, deploying, or configuring GitLab</li> <li>Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment, sometimes with multiple customer engagements at once</li> <li>Positive disposition and solution-oriented mindset</li> <li>Effective communication skills:&nbsp;<a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/values/#collaboration">Regularly achieve consensus with peers</a>, and provide clear status updates</li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/values/#efficiency">Self-motivated and self-managing</a>, with strong organizational skills</li> <li>Shares GitLab<a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/values/">values</a>, and work in accordance with those values</li> <li>Ability to thrive in a fully remote organization</li> <li>~20% travel may be required</li> </ul> </div> <div><span style="font-size: xx-small;"><span style="color: white;">Remote-Global</span></span></div><div class="content-conclusion"><h4><strong>How GitLab Supports As a SDR at GitLab, you get the opportunity to lead the initial outreach to targeted accounts working in conjunction with the Field and Digital Marketing teams. In this role you will leverage creative marketing and sales tactics to prospect and engage with multiple buyer personas and roles to introduce GitLab’s value. You will be responsible for generating qualified meetings and pipeline for GitLab's Sales organization.</p> <p>Don’t have a ton of knowledge about GitLab yet? Don’t worry. We have an extensive onboarding and training program at GitLab and you will be provided with necessary DevOps and GitLab knowledge to fulfill your role.</p> <h2><strong>What you'll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Effectively manage inbound lead flow</li> <li>Conduct high-level discovery conversations in target accounts</li> <li>Meet or exceed SDR sourced Sales Accepted Opportunity (SAO) volume targets</li> <li>Collaborate with and leverage teammates to develop targeted lists, call strategies, and messaging to drive opportunities</li> <li>Utilize business and industry knowledge to research accounts, identify key players, generate interest, create/identify compelling events, and develop accounts</li> <li>Work to have a variety of touches (call, email, social, etc.) on all leads in your assigned territory using Outreach.io</li> <li>Manage, track, and report on all activities and results using Salesforce</li> <li>Participate in documenting all processes in the GitLab handbook and update as needed with your Sales Development Manager</li> <li>Act as a mentor for new SDR hires in helping them navigate their key accounts</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What you'll bring</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Fluency in French is required</li> <li>Positive and energetic phone skills, excellent listening skills, strong writing skills</li> <li>A self-starter with a track record of successful, credible achievements</li> <li>You share our values, and work in accordance with those values</li> <li>Knowledge of business process, roles, and organizational structure</li> <li>Determined personality with a marketing and/or sales is a plus</li> <li>Eagerness to grow professionally with best-in-class <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/marketing/sales-development/tanuki-tech/#tanuki-tech">onboarding program</a>, support across the business and eligibility for promotion into an outbound role after 12 months as a successful SDR</li> <li>Globally we require excellent written and spoken English which is our company language</li> </ul> <div>&nbsp;</div><div All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry specific location-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting process.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy: </strong>Please review our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/candidate-faq/recruitment-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">Recruitment Privacy Policy.</a> Your privacy is important to us.</p> <p>GitLab is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. GitLab’s policies and practices relating to recruitment, employment, career development and advancement, promotion, and retirement are based solely on merit, regardless of race, color, religion, ancestry, sex (including pregnancy, lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression), national origin, age, citizenship, marital status, mental or physical disability, genetic information (including family medical history), discharge status from the military, protected veteran status (which includes disabled veterans, recently separated veterans, active duty wartime or campaign badge veterans, and Armed Forces service medal veterans), or any other basis protected by law. GitLab will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. See also&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/people-policies/inc-usa/#equal-employment-opportunity-policy" target="_blank">GitLab’s EEO Policy</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/labor-and-employment-notices/#eeoc-us-equal-employment-opportunity-commission-notices" target="_blank">EEO is the Law</a>. If you have a disability or special need that requires&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/people-policies/inc-usa/#reasonable-accommodation" target="_blank">accommodation</a>, please let us know during the&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/interviewing/#adjustments-to-our-interview-process" target="_blank">recruiting process</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Strategic Account Executive - Public Sector
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>GitLab is the intelligent orchestration platform for DevSecOps. GitLab enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. More than 50 million registered users and more than 50% of the Fortune 100* trust GitLab to ship better, more secure software faster.</p> <p>The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high-performance culture is driven by our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/values/">values</a> and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OuZIb5zszQI">Co-create the future with us</a> as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software.</p> <p>*<em>Fortune 500® is a registered trademark of Fortune Media IP Limited, used under license. Claim based on GitLab data. Fortune 100 refers to the top 20% ranked companies in the 2025 Fortune 500 list, published in June 2025. Fortune and Fortune Media IP Limited are not affiliated with, and do not endorse products or services of GitLab.</em></p></div><h2><strong>Key Role Purpose</strong></h2> <p>To drive GitLab platform adoption across public sector organizations, orchestrating successful partner relationships and direct engagement, ensuring alignment with government digital transformation initiatives.</p> <h2><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Lead GitLab platform enterprise sales across diverse public sector portfolio&nbsp;</li> <li>Develop and execute multi-year account strategies using MEDDPICC methodology</li> <li>Build C-level relationships across government and private sector institutions</li> <li>Drive platform adoption through centers of excellence</li> <li>Manage complex procurement processes across government/public sector frameworks</li> <li>Create sector-specific value propositions and business cases</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Territory Development &amp; Scale</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Build and execute strategic territory plan across public sector segments</li> <li>Create scalable prospecting and account development strategies</li> <li>Implement repeatable sector plays and reference programs</li> <li>Manage resource allocation across complex account portfolio</li> <li>Drive territory growth through new logo acquisition and expansion</li> <li>Develop territory-specific partner ecosystems</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Partner Ecosystem Management</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Drive revenue through strategic system integrators</li> <li>Develop relationships with regional service providers</li> <li>Coordinate with cloud provider partnerships (AWS, Azure, GCP)</li> <li>Enable managed service provider success</li> <li>Lead joint account planning and execution</li> <li>Create scalable partner enablement programs</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What You'll Bring</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Proven Italian public sector software sales experience</li> <li>Deep understanding of public sector digital transformation initiatives</li> <li>Experience with government framework procurement</li> <li>Multi-stakeholder engagement in complex organizations</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Technical Ecosystem Knowledge</strong></h3> <ul> <li>DevSecOps platform or a similar type of complex technology sales experience</li> <li>Understanding of complementary technologies</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Sales Methodology &amp; Process</strong></h3> <ul> <li>MEDDPICC methodology mastery and implementation</li> <li>Complex deal management experience</li> <li>Territory planning and scaling expertise</li> <li>Partner orchestration capability</li> <li>Proven forecast accuracy using MEDDPICC scoring</li> <li>Track record of complex deal closure</li> <li>Experience building territories from ground up</li> <li>Willingness to travel&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with open source solutions</li> <li>Strong presentation and negotiation skills</li> <li>Demonstrable territory management tool proficiency</li> <li>Track record of building scalable territory models</li> </ul> <div class="c-message_actions__container c-message__actions">&nbsp;</div> <div><span style="font-size: xx-small;"><span style="color: white;">Remote-Global</span></span></div><div class="content-conclusion"><h4><strong>How GitLab Supports Full-Time Employees</strong></h4> <ul> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/">Benefits to support your health, finances, and well-being</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/paid-time-off/">Flexible Paid Time Off</a>&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/erg-guide/#:~:text=Definition%20of%20the%20TMRG%20%2D%20Team%20Member%20Resource%20Groups,-TMRGs%20are%20voluntary&amp;text=The%20purpose%20for%20this%20type,developing%20the%20sense%20of%20belonging.">Team Member Resource Groups</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/stock-options/">Equity Compensation &amp; Employee Stock Purchase Plan</a></li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/learning-and-development/growth-and-development/">Growth and Development Fund</a></li> <li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/#parental-leave">Parental leave</a>&nbsp;</li> <li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/finance/expenses/#equipment">Home office</a> support</li> </ul> <p>Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/#examples-of-select-underrepresented-groups">underrepresented groups</a> are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.</p> <hr> <p><strong>Country Hiring Guidelines: </strong>GitLab hires new team members in countries around the world. All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry specific location-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting process.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy: </strong>Please review our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/candidate-faq/recruitment-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">Recruitment Privacy Policy.</a> Your privacy is important to us.</p> <p>GitLab is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. GitLab’s policies and practices relating to recruitment, employment, career development and advancement, promotion, and retirement are based solely on merit, regardless of race, color, religion, ancestry, sex (including pregnancy, lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression), national origin, age, citizenship, marital status, mental or physical disability, genetic information (including family medical history), discharge status from the military, protected veteran status (which includes disabled veterans, recently separated veterans, active duty wartime or campaign badge veterans, and Armed Forces service medal veterans), or any other basis protected by law. GitLab will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. See also&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/people-policies/inc-usa/#equal-employment-opportunity-policy" target="_blank">GitLab’s EEO Policy</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/labor-and-employment-notices/#eeoc-us-equal-employment-opportunity-commission-notices" target="_blank">EEO is the Law</a>. If you have a disability or special need that requires&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/people-policies/inc-usa/#reasonable-accommodation" target="_blank">accommodation</a>, please let us know during the&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/interviewing/#adjustments-to-our-interview-process" target="_blank">recruiting process</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Account Executive, Commercial - German Speaking
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>From Fivetran’s founding until now, our mission has remained the same: to make access to data as simple and reliable as electricity. With Fivetran, customer data arrives in their warehouses, canonical and ready to query, with no engineering or maintenance required. We’re proud that more organizations continue to leverage our technology every day to become truly data-driven.</p></div><p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>About the Role</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Fivetran is building the infrastructure that powers analytics and AI. We’re looking for a New Business Commercial Account Executive to help more companies across the DACH move, trust and use their data at scale. This role is well suited to someone who enjoys creating opportunities as much as closing them. You’ll play a hands-on role in outbound prospecting, shaping your own pipeline and guiding customers through thoughtful, consultative sales conversations.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">This is a full-time, remote position based out of London.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proactively identify and engage new commercial customers through outbound prospecting</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Build and close your own pipeline of opportunities across your territory Lead discovery conversations to understand customer data challenges and translate them into Fivetran solutions Collaborate closely with Sales Development, Solutions Engineering, Marketing and Partner teams</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Build productive relationships with technology partners and system integrators</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Share learnings and contribute to improving how we sell as we continue to scale</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">As part of our commitment to setting new hires up for success, all new sales team members attend a one-week, in-person Revenue Bootcamp during their second week at Fivetran. This bootcamp, held at one of our designated company locations, requires travel and is a mandatory part of the onboarding process.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">At least 2 years of closing experience in a SaaS or technology sales role</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">A proven track record of consistent overachievement against quota in previous roles</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Comfort and motivation in outbound-led sales, including prospecting and early-stage conversations</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Ability to navigate technical discussions and build credibility with data and engineering stakeholders</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Clear, confident communication and strong relationship-building skills</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiar with Command of the Message or other value based selling techniques</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Good organisation and follow-through across longer sales cycles</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">A collaborative mindset and interest in being an active part of a growing team</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Fluent in German</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Bonus Skills&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience selling data, analytics, infrastructure or developer-focused products</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Exposure to partner-led sales or co-selling motions</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with cloud platforms or modern data stack</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">#LI-LA1<br>#LI-REMOTE</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p class="p-rich_text_section" style="line-height: 1.3;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Perks and Benefits</strong></p> <ul> <li>100% employer-paid medical insurance<strong>*</strong></li> <li>Generous paid time-off policy (PTO), plus paid sick time, inclusive parental leave policy, holidays, and volunteer days off</li> <li>RSU stock grants*</li> <li>Professional development and training opportunities</li> <li>Company virtual happy hours, free food, and fun team-building activities</li> <li>Monthly cell phone stipend</li> <li>Access to an innovative mental health support platform that offers personalized care and resources in areas such as: therapy, coaching, and self-guided mindfulness exercises for all covered employees and their covered dependents.</li> </ul> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em><strong>*</strong>May vary by country and worker type - please reach out to your recruiter for more information</em></p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em>Click <a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1CdawUwjo1Q1B7ghZJ_owdmmHB8VtqhBu?usp=sharing" target="_blank">here</a> to learn more about Fivetran's Benefits by Region.</em></p> <hr> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">We’re honored to be <a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran.com/blog/hvr-acquisition-series-d" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran.com/blog/hvr-acquisition-series-d" data-sk="tooltip_parent">valued at over $5.6 billion</a>, but more importantly, we’re proud of our&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran.com/culture" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran.com/culture" data-sk="tooltip_parent">core values of Get Stuck In, Do the Right Thing, and One Team, One Dream</a>. Read about us in&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran-com.s3.amazonaws.com/news/forbes-aug-sept-2022-digital-reprint-10-21-22.pdf" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran-com.s3.amazonaws.com/news/forbes-aug-sept-2022-digital-reprint-10-21-22.pdf" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Forbes</a>.&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">Fivetran brings together high-quality talent across the globe to make data access as easy and reliable as electricity for our customers. We value and recognize that our customers benefit from having innovative teams made of people from many backgrounds, experiences, and identities. Fivetran promotes diversity, equity, inclusion &amp; belonging through attracting, recruiting, developing, and retaining a diverse workforce, not only because it is the right thing to do, but because it helps us build a world-class company to better serve our customers, our people and our communities.</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">To learn more about Fivetran’s culture and what it’s like to be part of the team, <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xlhtp4dGh8o" target="_blank">click here</a> and enjoy our video.</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">To learn more about our candidate privacy policy, you can <a href="https://fivetran.com/candidate-privacy" target="_blank">read our statement here</a>.</p> <hr> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em>We are committed to ensuring that all candidates have an equal opportunity to participate in our interview process. If you require accommodations at any stage of the process due to a disability, medical condition, or any other circumstance, please don't hesitate to submit your request by filling out this <a href="https://forms.gle/V7k3t4u9j523XkEt6">form</a>. We will work with you to provide reasonable accommodations to facilitate your participation and ensure a fair and accessible interview experience. Your request and any information provided will be kept confidential and will not impact your candidacy. We look forward to hearing from you and accommodating your needs to the best of our ability.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Technology Partner Sales Manager
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>From Fivetran’s founding until now, our mission has remained the same: to make access to data as simple and reliable as electricity. With Fivetran, customer data arrives in their warehouses, canonical and ready to query, with no engineering or maintenance required. We’re proud that more organizations continue to leverage our technology every day to become truly data-driven.</p></div><p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>About the Role</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We’re looking for a Technology Partner Sales Manager (PSM) to join our Global Alliances team. In this role, you will be a key driver of revenue execution, specifically focused on scaling our co-selling ecosystem with major technology partners like Snowflake, Databricks, and hyperscalers (AWS, GCP, and Azure). You will act as the bridge between Fivetran’s internal sales teams and our partners' field organizations, ensuring we source, co-sell, and win high-impact deals together.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This is a full-time position based remotely in Singapore .</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Technologies You’ll Use</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Salesforce (SFDC): For opportunity tracking, pipeline management, and partner activity tagging.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Crossbeam: For account mapping, list enrichment, and identifying joint targets with partners.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Gong &amp; Looker: For identifying co-sell opportunities and analyzing pipeline health.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Suger: To scale day-to-day co-selling processes and system improvements.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Slack: For real-time co-sell alignment and communication with partner AE teams.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Execute joint sales motions with technology partners to drive revenue and meet influenced incremental booking quotas.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Drive pipeline creation by identifying co-sell opportunities within the Fivetran open pipeline and submitting them for partner alignment.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Lead co-sell calls and account workshops, owning the agenda, introductions, and "better together" value proposition messaging.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Enable internal Fivetran AEs on partner solutions, use cases, and joint GTM strategies to increase partner-influenced deals.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Source and execute partner enablements, including QBRs, hands-on labs (HOLs), and sales training for partner AEs.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Own account mapping efforts using Crossbeam to identify overlapping targets and provide recommendations to Fivetran and partner reps.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Establish sales leadership alignment by facilitating recurring cadences between Fivetran and partner sales managers.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Communicate field feedback to Partner Development Managers (PDMs) to continuously improve partner offerings and messaging.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Manage regional partner events, such as happy hours and conferences, to build Fivetran brand awareness and relationship depth.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Track and report on sales KPIs, ensuring all partner-influenced activity is accurately tagged and reflected in global dashboards.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Skills We’re Looking For</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Co-Selling Excellence: Proven ability to navigate complex co-sell cycles with hyperscalers and data platforms (Snowflake, Databricks, etc.).</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strategic Relationship Management: Experience building and maintaining high-trust relationships with external partner AEs and sales leadership.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Sales Enablement: Skill in distilling complex technical integrations into compelling "why Fivetran" value propositions for partner sellers.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Data-Driven Pipeline Management: Proficiency in using CRM and account mapping tools to identify and prioritize high-value opportunities.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Collaboration &amp; Orchestration: Ability to coordinate cross-functional efforts between Sales, Marketing, and Partner Development teams.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Event Execution: Experience sourcing and managing logistics for regional sales events, lunch and learns, or QBRs.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Clear Communication: Strong ability to deliver joint win stories ("Win Wires") and updates that keep Fivetran top-of-mind for partners.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Bonus Skills</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience working directly within the Snowflake or Databricks ecosystem.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Familiarity with Cloud Marketplaces and the technical nuances of cloud-specific co-selling motions.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Background in Technical Sales or a deep understanding of the modern data stack (ETL/ELT).</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">#LI-REMOTE</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: time, inclusive parental leave policy, holidays, and volunteer days off</li> <li>RSU stock grants*</li> <li>Professional development and training opportunities</li> <li>Company virtual happy hours, href="https://fivetran.com/culture" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran.com/culture" data-sk="tooltip_parent">core values of Get Stuck In, Do the Right Thing, and One Team, One Dream</a>. Read about us in&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran-com.s3.amazonaws.com/news/forbes-aug-sept-2022-digital-reprint-10-21-22.pdf" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran-com.s3.amazonaws.com/news/forbes-aug-sept-2022-digital-reprint-10-21-22.pdf" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Forbes</a>.&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">Fivetran brings together high-quality talent across the globe to make data access as easy and reliable as electricity for our customers. We value and recognize that our customers benefit from having innovative teams made of people from many backgrounds, experiences, and identities. Fivetran promotes diversity, equity, inclusion &amp; belonging through attracting, recruiting, developing, and retaining a diverse workforce, not only because it is the right thing to do, but because it helps us build a world-class company to better serve our customers, our people and our communities.</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">To learn more about Fivetran’s culture and what it’s like to be part of the team, <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xlhtp4dGh8o" target="_blank">click here</a> and enjoy our video.</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">To learn more about our candidate privacy policy, you can <a href="https://fivetran.com/candidate-privacy" target="_blank">read our statement here</a>.</p> <hr> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em>We are committed to ensuring that all candidates have an equal opportunity to participate in our interview process. If you require accommodations at any stage of the process due to a disability, medical condition, or any other circumstance, please don't hesitate to submit your request by filling out this <a href="https://forms.gle/V7k3t4u9j523XkEt6">form</a>. We will work with you to provide reasonable accommodations to facilitate your participation and ensure a fair and accessible interview experience. Your request and any information provided will be kept confidential and will not impact your candidacy. We look forward to hearing from you and accommodating your needs to the best of our ability.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Sales System Engineer
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Mixpanel</strong></p> <p>Mixpanel turns data clarity into innovation. Trusted by more than 29,000 companies, including Workday, Pinterest, LG, and Rakuten Viber, Mixpanel’s AI-first digital analytics help teams accelerate adoption, improve retention, and ship with confidence. Powering this is an industry-leading platform that combines product and web analytics, session replay, experimentation, feature flags, and metric trees. Mixpanel delivers insights that customers trust. Visit <a href="mixpanel.com" target="_blank">mixpanel.com</a> to learn more.</p></div><p><strong>About the Team</strong></p> <p>The GTM Systems &amp; Tools team at Mixpanel helps the Sales, Marketing &amp; Finance teams execute their global and regional strategies through:</p> <ul> <li>Maintaining a robust, trustworthy &amp; scalable CRM system</li> <li>Automating key workflows that drive efficiency</li> <li>Identifying, proposing &amp; supporting tools that fit our overall GTM strategy and data architecture</li> </ul> <p>This team sits under the GTM Org and works very closely with the growth &amp; data teams to help achieve our broader architecture &amp; vision.</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>This is a hybrid role based out of the San Francisco Bay Area or New York City Area. As a Sales Systems Engineer, you will be a technical partner to our stakeholder teams and be involved in the full software development life cycle starting from understanding the business needs/problems, translating them into technical requirements, identifying solutions, executing on them, creating and testing user stories and following through until the business problem is solved. This person must be comfortable communicating with various teams and stakeholders to understand business problems and elicit requirements. This is a critical role for Mixpanel at this stage of our growth, directly impacting our ability to meet our revenue goals.</p> <p><strong>We're Looking For Someone To</strong></p> <ul> <li>Design and develop secure, scalable technical solutions on the CRM (Salesforce) platform using out of the box automations such as Flows, validations, and security settings</li> <li>Provide technical guidance to key stakeholders for new projects, enhancements, and bug fixes related to solutions being delivered on the Salesforce platform</li> <li>Maintain strong knowledge of Salesforce system architecture and development best practices</li> <li>Assist in increasing the efficiency of our GTM teams and in scaling our GTM stack (Co-pilot, Clari, Outreach,&nbsp;<a href="http://customer.io/" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=http://customer.io/&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1776876820587000&amp;usg=AOvVaw0GLLo2bgShpDw5PkM5NhKD">Customer.io</a>, LeanData, Hubspot) for rapid growth</li> <li>Provide ongoing support and management of SFDC</li> <ul> <li>Function as the go-to person for enhancement requests and inquiries; Coordinate updates, modify fields and workflows, etc as needed</li> <li>Support day-to-day management of Salesforce configuration – customizing core architecture as well as profiles and user permissions</li> <li>Support day-to-day management &amp; execute changes of our lead routing/territory management system</li> </ul> <li>Drive data quality and enrichment projects across the systems</li> <ul> <li>Own the integrity of data at all stages in our GTM stack</li> <li>Manage enrichment vendors, optimizing for data integrity and accuracy</li> <li>Work with internal teams to establish processes that improve the data integrity of all objects; define best practices to help build increased seller productivity and SFDC hygiene</li> </ul> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li>3+ years experience in supporting full-stack solutions using Salesforce</li> <li>Experience in Agentic workflows + leveraging AI to increase efficiency&nbsp;</li> <li>Proficient in requirements gathering, documentation, and user testing</li> <li>Experience in Salesforce customization and automation (Flows, Validation rules, Approval process)</li> <li>Solid understanding of Salesforce platform capabilities, features, and best practices</li> <li>Skilled in leveraging CPQ tools to optimize sales workflows and pricing models</li> <li>Salesforce Certified Administrator</li> <li>Should be a creative, self-starting, fast-learning, detail-oriented team player who thrives with multi-tasking in a fast-paced environment.</li> <li>Experience with data cleansing &amp; data enrichment projects</li> <li>Experience working with LeanData or related tools for lead routing, territory management</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points if you</strong></p> <ul> <li>Salesforce Certified Advanced Administrator</li> <li>Salesforce Sales Cloud Certified</li> <li>Start-up SaaS and rapidly expanding sales organization experience strongly preferred</li> <li>Proficient with data warehouses, SQL &amp; other analytical tools (Fivetran, Hightouch)</li> <li>APEX Experience&nbsp;</li> <li>Hubspot certification&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p><span data-sheets-value="{&quot;1&quot;:2,&quot;2&quot;:&quot;The total target compensation (TTC) for this full-time position is $174,600 - $213,400 across the United States. This amount includes base compensation and variable compensation in the form of either a company bonus or commissions. Variable compensation type is determined by your role and level. This position is also eligible for equity consideration and other benefits including medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage. You can view our benefits offerings here.\n\nOur salary ranges are determined by role and level and are benchmarked to the SF Bay Area Technology data cut released by Radford, a global compensation database. The range displayed represents the minimum and maximum TTC for new hire salaries for the position across all of our US locations. To stay on top of market conditions, we refresh our salary ranges twice a year so these ranges may change in the future. Within the range, individual pay is determined by experience, job-related skills, qualifications, and other factors. If you have questions about the specific range, your recruiter can share this information.&quot;}" data-sheets-userformat="{&quot;2&quot;:769,&quot;3&quot;:{&quot;1&quot;:0},&quot;11&quot;:4,&quot;12&quot;:0}">The amount listed below is the total target cash compensation (TTCC) and includes base compensation and variable compensation in the form of either a company bonus or commissions. Variable compensation type is determined by your role and level. In addition to the cash compensation provided, this position is also eligible for equity consideration and other benefits including medical, vision, and dental insurance coverage. You can view our benefits offerings <a href="https://mxpnl.notion.site/Check-out-our-benefits-869112a6cabe4c81a2b9da99de28f636" target="_blank">here</a>.<br><br>Our salary ranges are determined by role and level and are benchmarked to the SF Bay Area Technology data cut released by Radford, a global compensation database. The range displayed represents the minimum and maximum TTCC for new hire salaries for the position across all of our US locations. To stay on top of market conditions, we refresh our salary ranges twice a year so these ranges may change in the future. Within the range, individual pay is determined by experience, job-related skills, qualifications, and other factors. If you have questions about the specific range, your recruiter can share this information.</span></p></div><div class="title">Mixpanel Compensation Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$154,500</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$209,500 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Benefits and Perks</strong><strong><br></strong></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Vision, and Dental Care</li> <li>Mental Wellness Benefit</li> <li>Generous Vacation Policy &amp; Additional Company Holidays</li> <li>Enhanced Parental Leave</li> <li>Volunteer Time Off</li> <li>Additional US Benefits: Pre-Tax Benefits including 401(K), Wellness Benefit, Holiday Break</li> </ul> <p><em>*please note that benefits and perks for contract positions will vary*</em></p> <p><strong>Culture Values</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Make Bold Bets:</strong> We choose courageous action over comfortable progress.</li> <li><strong>Innovate with Insight:</strong> We tackle decisions with rigor and judgment - combining data, experience and collective wisdom to drive&nbsp;powerful outcomes.</li> <li><strong>One Team:</strong> We collaborate across boundaries to achieve far greater impact than any of us could accomplish alone.</li> <li><strong>Candor with Connection:</strong> We build meaningful relationships that enable honest feedback and direct conversations.</li> <li><strong>Champion the Customer:</strong> We seek to deeply understand our customers’ needs, ensuring their success is our north star.</li> <li><strong>Powerful Simplicity:</strong> We find elegant solutions to complex problems, making sophisticated things accessible.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Why choose Mixpanel?</strong></p> <p>We’re a leader in analytics with over 9,000 customers and $277M raised from prominent investors: like Andreessen-Horowitz, Sequoia, YC, and, most recently, Bain Capital. Mixpanel’s pioneering event-based data analytics platform offers a powerful yet simple solution for companies to understand user behaviors and easily track overarching company success metrics. Our accomplished teams continuously facilitate our expansion by tackling the ever-evolving challenges tied to scaling, reliability, design, and service. Choosing to work at Mixpanel means you’ll be helping the world’s most innovative companies learn from their data so they can make better decisions.</p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Mixpanel is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity. At Mixpanel, we are focused on things that really matter—our people, our customers, our partners—out of a recognition that those relationships are the most valuable assets we have. We actively encourage women, people with disabilities, veterans, underrepresented minorities, and LGBTQ+ people to apply. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance or other similar laws that may be applicable, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. We’ve immersed ourselves in our Culture and Values as our guiding principles for the impact we want to have and the future we are building.</span></p></div>

jobs.title: Bridge - Operations Associate
jobs.description: <h2>Who we are</h2> <h3>About Stripe</h3> <p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies - from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups - use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone's reach while doing the most important work of your career.</p> <p>Bridge, a Stripe company, is a rapidly growing business and the number of developers integrating our APIs is growing quickly. We provide Slack-based support to our developers on a wide range of topics in close partnership with our internal engineering team. We’re a small but mighty team that’s expanding global coverage and is looking to make our first Product Support Specialists hires in Mexico City.</p> <h3>About the team</h3> <p>In this role, you’ll be working directly with developers integrating Bridge APIs and helping them resolve their issues. You will take ownership of complex, technical user issues and work across teams to resolve them. As part of the team, you’ll have a big impact to grow the Product Support operation and enhance various aspects such as capacity planning and forecasting, operational tools and systems, workflow optimization and automation, metrics and reporting, quality control, and more.</p> <h2>What you’ll do</h2> <p>Stripe is launching Stripe Delivery Centers - a brand new global team to design, implement and grow Stripe’s operations for the next decade. We are looking for dynamic and curious people that have a passion for solving global user issues, building operations, driving process improvements and want to play a front-line role in building this new operational capability for Stripe and accelerating Stripe’s growth. If you like challenging, scaled problems and are an amazing teammate, we want to hear from you!</p> <h3>&nbsp;</h3> <h3>Responsibilities</h3> <ul> <li>Analyze and troubleshoot complex technical issues through direct user interaction (Slack) and leveraging your knowledge of API documentation.</li> <li>Develop product and platform expertise, working closely with Engineering, Product, and Operations teams to diagnose and resolve user issues.</li> <li>Strategically optimize and scale support processes to enhance efficiency and improve the overall user experience, incorporating data-driven insights and metrics.</li> <li>Lead continuous improvement initiatives aimed at hitting key performance metrics.</li> <li>Create and refine documentation to empower users to resolve issues via self-service, reducing dependency on support teams.</li> <li>Constantly challenge the status quo and push for innovation in user support strategies and operational processes.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h2>Who you are</h2> <p>We're looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role. If you meet these requirements, you are encouraged to apply. The preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement.</p> <h3>Minimum requirements</h3> <ul> <li>1-5 years of experience in a customer support role.&nbsp;</li> <li>You have a user first mindset and are energized by the challenge of solving difficult problems.</li> <li>You have excellent communication skills, both written and verbally.</li> <li>You excel in analytical thinking and problem solving.</li> <li>You might have prior experience in customer service or internal/external user facing operations processes, you are an organized, self-starter with passion for finding solutions to our user’s challenges.</li> <li>You have a process-oriented mindset and ability to get things done.</li> <li>You enjoy working in an in-office environment with strong cross team collaboration and support.</li> <li>You are able to prioritize and enjoy working in a quick-moving environment.</li> <li>You are humble and have a proven track record for working well across teams and with external partners.</li> <li>You're willing to periodically work a weekend day for which you will receive a weekday off; the SDC operates during daytime hours with shifts from the morning through early evening.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h3>Preferred qualifications</h3> <ul> <li>Familiarity with SQL and ability to use template or premade SQL queries as part of investigations.</li> <li>Prior experience with cryptocurrency support.</li> </ul>
